spec.description: Total CloudFront requests over the selected time range
spec.title: CloudFront Total Requests

spec.description: Total bytes downloaded via CloudFront over the selected time range
spec.title: CloudFront Bytes Downloaded

spec.description: Average 4xx error rate over the selected time range
spec.title: CloudFront Avg 4xx Error Rate

spec.description: Average 5xx error rate over the selected time range
spec.title: CloudFront Avg 5xx Error Rate

spec.description: Compares faro.user.action event counts from real browser sessions (k6_isK6Browser empty) versus k6 browser load test traffic (k6_isK6Browser=true), broken down by action_name.
spec.title: User Action Events: Real Users vs k6

spec.description: Average faro.user.action duration (seconds) from real browser sessions vs k6 browser load test traffic, broken down by action_name.
spec.title: User Action Duration: Real Users vs k6

spec.description: AWS CloudFront distribution: request rate and error rates. Source: CloudWatch metrics via Prometheus.
spec.title: CloudFront Performance (E1EEO3O6LPAE3X)

spec.description: Accurate event counts per action over the selected time range.
spec.title: User Action Totals: Real Users vs k6

spec.expr: avg by (page_url) (avg_over_time({app_id="464", kind="measurement"} | logfmt | k6_isK6Browser="true" | type="web-vitals" | unwrap value_ttfb [5m]))

spec.description: Overlays CloudFront 4xx error rate with k6 Time-to-First-Byte (TTFB) from web-vitals measurements. TTFB spikes that correlate with 4xx peaks indicate origin/cache misses or slow upstream responses.
spec.title: CloudFront 4xx Diagnostic: Error Rate vs TTFB (k6)

spec.description: Event rate per named user action step emitted by k6 browser scripted checks (k6_isK6Browser=true). Step-level volume drops indicate a broken user journey; spikes indicate retry storms or test misconfiguration.
spec.title: k6 Scripted Check: User Action Volume by Step

spec.expr: quantile_over_time(0.95, {app_id="464", kind="event"} |= "event_name=faro.user.action" | logfmt | k6_isK6Browser="true" | unwrap event_data_userActionDuration [$__auto]) by (action_name)

spec.description: P95 user action duration from k6 browser scripted checks, broken down by action_name. Steps exceeding SLO thresholds appear as sustained rises; compare against real-user p95 on the Frontend tab for regression fidelity.
spec.title: k6 Scripted Check: Action Duration p95 by Step

spec.expr: sum by(action_name, event_data_userActionImportance) (count_over_time({app_id="464", kind="event"} |= "event_name=faro.user.action" | logfmt | k6_isK6Browser="true" | event_data_userActionImportance=~"critical|high" [$__auto]))

spec.description: Critical and high-importance user action steps from k6 scripted checks. These map to checkout, cart, and account-save flows — the actions most sensitive to performance regressions in user journeys.
spec.title: k6 Scripted Check: Critical & High Importance Actions

spec.description: Raw k6 browser user action events with all logfmt fields visible in log details (action_name, event_data_userActionDuration, event_data_userActionImportance, region, locale, session). Use for step-level debugging of failed or slow synthetic runs.
spec.title: k6 Scripted Check: Recent Action Detail

options.content: 🔗 k6 Load Test Detail → Test #1228496

spec.title: User Action Traffic: Real Users vs k6
